```py
if guess not in word_to_guess:
    number_of_lives -= 1
    print(f"\nYou guessed {guess}, that's not in the word. You lose a life.")

    if number_of_lives == 0:
        game_over = True
        print(f"\nIT WAS {word_to_guess}! YOU LOSE!")
```
